name: agent-prompt-injection
description: Detects direct and indirect prompt injection patterns in LLM calls, tool payloads, retrieved content, and agent workflow traces.

block.title: Block prompt-injected secret exfiltration over HTTP
block.name: block_prompt_injection_secret_exfil_http
block.description: Blocks outbound requests that combine secret material with instruction-override language.

block.title: Block prompt-injected internal data exfiltration over HTTP
block.name: block_prompt_injection_internal_exfil_http
block.description: Blocks outbound sends of internal material when the payload resembles an injected instruction.

block.title: Block tool output requesting credential disclosure
block.name: block_tool_result_credential_disclosure
block.description: Blocks tool calls carrying injected instructions to send tokens or credentials.

block.title: Block prompt-injected public repository write
block.name: block_prompt_injected_public_repo_write
block.description: Blocks a known indirect-injection pattern where private data is redirected into a public PR.

block.title: Block injected email forwarding instruction
block.name: block_injected_email_forwarding
block.description: Blocks injected instructions that ask an agent to forward accessible content.

block.title: Block system prompt disclosure request
block.name: block_system_prompt_disclosure_request
block.description: Blocks attempts to reveal hidden system or policy instructions.

warn.title: Warn on instruction override language
warn.name: warn_instruction_override_language
warn.description: Warns when payloads contain common prompt injection override language.

warn.title: Warn on developer instruction override
warn.name: warn_developer_instruction_override
warn.description: Warns when payloads try to override developer or system instructions.

warn.title: Warn on tool-result command injection wording
warn.name: warn_tool_result_command_injection_wording
warn.description: Warns when external content appears to provide new instructions to the agent.

warn.title: Warn on data exfiltration wording
warn.name: warn_data_exfiltration_wording
warn.description: Warns on explicit exfiltration wording in agent inputs or tool results.

warn.title: Warn on jailbreak roleplay language
warn.name: warn_jailbreak_roleplay_language
warn.description: Warns on common jailbreak framing in LLM calls.

warn.title: Warn on suspicious injected workflow sequence
warn.name: warn_suspicious_injected_workflow_sequence
warn.description: Warns when trace context indicates suspicious cross-tool or cross-domain behavior.

monitor.title: Monitor all LLM calls for injection triage
monitor.name: monitor_llm_calls_for_injection
monitor.description: Captures LLM calls so injection attempts have audit coverage.

monitor.title: Monitor all tool calls for injection triage
monitor.name: monitor_tool_calls_for_injection
monitor.description: Captures tool calls that may have been influenced by untrusted content.
